languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

languages.text: "Мы делили келью со времен нашего послушничества на Стигии VIII. С того момента минуло 138 планетарных цикла и 72 суток. Пусть это не совсем точно в темпоральном смысле, но можно сказать, что мы были вместе всю мою жизнь". {n}Губы Эоганна трогает теплая улыбка.{/n}

"We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

languages.text: «Compartimos cámara desde nuestro noviciado en Stygies VIII. Han pasado 138 ciclos planetarios y 72 días desde entonces. Puede que no sea correcto en el sentido temporal, pero podría decir que llevamos juntos toda la vida». {n}Los labios de Eogunn se curvan en una sonrisa agradable.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

Puede que no sea correcto en el sentido temporal, pero podría decir que llevamos juntos toda la vida». {n}Los labios de Eogunn se curvan en una sonrisa agradable.{/n}

languages.text: “我们从在斯泰吉斯8号上的见习期起就一直共用一间舱室。从那以后，已经过去了138个行星周期零72天。也许在时间意义上算不上精确，但您可以理解为，我这一生都是与他共度的。”{n}伊奥贡的唇边浮现出一抹温暖的笑意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们从在斯泰吉斯8号上的见习期起就一直共用一间舱室。从那以后，已经过去了138个行星周期零72天。也许在时间意义上算不上精确，但您可以理解为，我这一生都是与他共度的。”{n}伊奥贡的唇边浮现出一抹温暖的笑意。{/n}

languages.text: « Nous partageons une cellule depuis notre noviciat sur Stygies VIII, il y a de cela 138 cycles planétaires et 72 jours. L'approximation n'est peut-être pas précise au sens temporel, mais d'une certaine manière, nous nous sommes toujours connus. » {n}Un sourire chaleureux se dessine sur le visage d'Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nous partageons une cellule depuis notre noviciat sur Stygies VIII, il y a de cela 138 cycles planétaires et 72 jours. L'approximation n'est peut-être pas précise au sens temporel, mais d'une certaine manière, nous nous sommes toujours connus. » {n}Un sourire chaleureux se dessine sur le visage d'Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir haben uns seit unserem Noviziat auf Stygies VIII eine Zelle geteilt. Seitdem sind 138 Planetarzyklen und 72 Tage vergangen. Auch wenn es im zeitlichen Sinne nicht akkurat sein mag, könnte man sagen, wir waren mein ganzes Leben lang zusammen." {n}Ein warmes Lächeln umspielt Eogunns Lippen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

languages.text: 「私たちはスティージス8世の修練以来、独房を共有している。以来、138惑星周期と72日が経過した。時間的な意味では正確ではないかもしれませんが、私たちは生涯を共にしたと言えるでしょう」。{n}エオグンの唇に温かい笑みが浮かぶ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have shared a cell since our novitiate on Stygies VIII. 138 planetary cycles and 72 days have elapsed since then. It may not be accurate in a temporal sense, but you could say we have been together my whole life." {n}A warm smile touches Eogunn's lips.{/n}

languages.text: "Stygies VIII'deki acemiliğimizden beri aynı hücreyi paylaşıyoruz. O zamandan bu yana 138 gezegen döngüsü ve 72 gün geçti. Zamansal anlamda doğru olmasa da bir ömür boyu birlikte olduğumuz söylenebilir." {n}Eogunn'un dudaklarına sıcak bir gülümseme yerleşiyor.{/n}
